overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing an NCPD officer patrolling a rain-soaked Night City street at night. The scene features heavy rainfall, vibrant neon signage reflecting off wet pavement, and an empty urban commercial district.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past a burning barrel and neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: horizontal green neon sign mounted on building facade
metal barrel with open fire burning inside, emitting smoke
green painted metal posts and rails separating sidewalk from street
building facade with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following an NCPD officer walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk. Green neon signs illuminate the left side while a burning trash barrel sits on the right. The wet concrete reflects the vibrant neon lights as the character moves forward through the empty commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner intersection with traffic control

events.description: character stops walking at the street corner
character looks left and right while observing the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at the corner, looking around the intersection before preparing to cross

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
white painted lines marking pedestrian crossing area
building across the street with bright neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a street corner, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to the open intersection. The camera pans slightly as the officer surveys the empty street, with traffic lights and crosswalk markings now visible. The neon-lit building across the street becomes the focal point as rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk leading to neon-lit commercial building

events.description: character begins walking across the street crosswalk
passing the pedestrian traffic signal showing green walk indicator

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet asphalt crosswalk toward the building with bright neon signage and murals

entered.detail: traffic signal showing green walking figure illuminated
large painted face murals on the building facade beneath neon signs

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and moves through the open street, leaving the sidewalk railings behind. The pedestrian signal shows green as the officer approaches the opposite building, which features prominent neon signage and distinctive face murals. The wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights as the crossing continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, neon-lit sidewalk into a wide, rain-slicked urban intersection. It begins by trailing an NCPD officer walking past green neon signs and a burning trash barrel, with the wet concrete mirroring the vibrant lights of the empty commercial street. As the officer reaches a street corner, the camera pans to open the view, shifting from the enclosed walkway to a broad intersection where traffic lights and crosswalk markings emerge through the downpour. The scene then expands as the character steps onto the asphalt, leaving the sidewalk railings behind to cross toward a building adorned with prominent neon signage and face murals. Finally, the movement concludes as the officer traverses the open street, with the surrounding neon glow reflecting intensely off the saturated pavement.
